keywords.job: I have no job. I just live for the gods of Tibia.
keywords.name: I am Brother Yberius.
keywords.god: They are the creators of Tibia and all life on it.
keywords.life: There are the plants, the citizens, and the monsters.
keywords.plant: Crunor, the god of plants and fertility, watches over all plants, small and big.
keywords.citizen: Just walk around and meet them. Chat and learn about them.
keywords.monster: Even they have their part in the bigger scheme. Even if it eludes us mere mortals.
keywords.king: The king resides in the far away city of Thais.
keywords.tibianus: The king resides in the far away city of Thais.
keywords.army: The royal army is here to protect us.
keywords.ferumbras: The gods only know what this spawn of darkness might be up to.
keywords.excalibug: This blasphemous weapon has to be destroyed.
keywords.news: I won't take part in idle gossip.
keywords.help: Earn some gold and upgrade your equipment.
keywords.quest: Earn some gold and upgrade your equipment.
keywords.task: Earn some gold and upgrade your equipment.
keywords.what: Earn some gold and upgrade your equipment.
keywords.do: Earn some gold and upgrade your equipment.
keywords.gold: If you need money, you have to slay monsters and take their gold. Look for swamptrolls in the swamps. But be careful. They use poisoned weapons.
keywords.money: If you need money, you have to slay monsters and take their gold. Look for swamptrolls in the swamps. But be careful. They use poisoned weapons.
keywords.equipment: First you should buy a machete. You will need it in the swamps. And better don't explore without a shovel and a rope.
keywords.eat: If you want to heal your wounds, buy somthething to eat or hunt some small game. If you are very weak just ask me to heal you.
keywords.food: If you want to heal your wounds, buy somthething to eat or hunt some small game. If you are very weak just ask me to heal you.
keywords.blessing: There are five different blessings available in five sacred places. These blessings are: the spiritual shielding, the spark of the phoenix, the embrace of tibia, the fire of the suns and the wisdom of solitude.
keywords.pilgrimage: Whenever you receive a lethal wound your lifeforce is damaged. With every single of the five blessings you have this damage will be reduced.
keywords.ashes: Whenever you receive a lethal wound your lifeforce is damaged. With every single of the five blessings you have this damage will be reduced.
keywords.spiritual: You can receive the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
keywords.shielding: You can receive the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
keywords.sacred: Just ask in which of the five blessings you are interested in.
keywords.places: Just ask in which of the five blessings you are interested in.
keywords.spark: The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
keywords.phoenix: The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
keywords.embrace: The druids north of Carlin can provide you with the embrace of tibia.
keywords.fire: Ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel .
keywords.suns: Ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel .
keywords.wisdom: Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.
keywords.solitude: Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.
keywords.time: Now, it is . Ask Shiantis for a watch, if you need one.

texts: Welcome, young ! If you are new in Tibia, ask me for help.
I have no job. I just live for the gods of Tibia.

greetingPatterns.response: Welcome, young %N! If you are new in Tibia, ask me for help.
